## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code improvement (no functional change)
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî config, deps, tooling
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] No `console.log` or `print()` debug statements
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Migrations included if models changed
- [ ] No `DEBUG=True` or hardcoded secrets
